case_title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ITS ASSIGNEES VS. YOUNG YEN LEE et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESORS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, YOUNG YEN DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2447 31ST AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT AND CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION UNDER CCP 415.45 (NO S.A.S.E., COPY IN D.206)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, YOUNG YEN DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESORS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, YOUNG YEN DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE OF $0.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESORS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, YOUNG YEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESORS SERVED NOV-09-2011, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, YOUNG YEN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, ITS ASSIGNEES AND/OR SUCCESORS SERVED NOV-09-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
